/usr/bin/ar qc lib/liboperators.a CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/chunked_softmax_ce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/memory_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/mobile_safe_matmul.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/memory_first_attention.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/memory_first_mlp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/step_arena.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/backward_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/core/autograd_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/optim/optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/optim/adam.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/optim/mobile_optimizer_extensions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/optim/mobile_optimizer_state_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/optim/mobile_optimizer_advanced.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/memory/mobile_param_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/memory/mobile_param_optimizations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/memory/mobile_specific_optimizations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/memory/mobile_zero.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/activations/mobile_activation_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/activations/deepspeed_checkpoint_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/operators.dir/memory/activation_checkpointer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib lib/liboperators.a
